item.title: I Accidentally Awakened as a God and Still Failed Group Projects Chapter 1

item.description:
HELLO…… WELCOME TO OUR CLUB PAGE smiley

THE TRI-COUNTY AMATEUR RADIO CLUB OPERATES 1 Weekly NET THE KØMOB Moberly 2 METER NET AT 8 PM EVERY THURSDAY- JOIN US! any current F.C.C. license holders @ 147.090 + 0.6 offset PL Tone Squelch 127.3 Our weekly net control is Alan- KEØPEI or one of our Alternate Backup Operators. Our Club has 2 Repeaters in use, 2-Meter 147.090 + 0.6 offset PL Tone Squelch 127.3 and 70-cm 443.975 5.0 offset NO PL Tone The next TRI-COUNTY AMATEUR RADIO CLUB meeting is on June 16th 2026 @ 6:30PM all are welcome. Please join us…. The counties we serve in our memebership are Randolph, Charition, Howard in Missouri Also With our (ARES) Amateur Radio Emergency Services Group for Randolph County Mo. @ this meeting address 1301 E Logan St, Moberly, MO 65270
